projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts.
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

projects.name: Wraith Browser
projects.handoff_excerpt: Hosted Corpo API live at https://wraith-browser.vercel.app and direct VPS at 207.244.232.227:8080. AGPL repo + proprietary api-server tier both deploying clean.
blockers: FR-4 cross-repo wraith-transport bridge pending ClaudioOS session

projects.name: Kalshi Trader v7 (Pixiedust)

projects.name: Job Hunter MCP

projects.name: The Right Wire
projects.handoff_excerpt: Healthy. No code changes today. Warm-account post #2 went out under @therightwireai (naval/ARG-spotting angle). Documented X automation gotcha (Lexical editor) and curated public-apis catalogue against TRW intel surface.
milestones_hit: Public-apis curated catalogue written to wiki

projects.name: PerformanceTracker
projects.handoff_excerpt: App live on iPhone 17 Pro Max. Abacus wired (All-Orgs + per-org, 7/30/90/365d window). HealthKit auth fixed by removing xcodegen info: block. 32 meal templates incl. post-strength refeed (carb-gated).

projects.name: Antcolony (PPO trainer)
projects.handoff_excerpt: PPO r5/r6/r7 results in. Nash plateau confirmed at ~47% on 7-archetype bench; v1 hits 50.7% on wider 5-mix bench. Cold-start at h=128 regresses; warm-start r7b also regresses. BC ceiling holds — outcome-driven RL refinement not pushing past.
milestones_hit: PPO r6 reward shaping + noisy pool shipped
PPO r7 3-path attack (stochastic-inference + wider bench + arch change) shipped
blockers: BC ceiling: PPO refinement not exceeding bootstrap policy on this bench

strategic_events.detail: Antcolony PPO trainer reaches honest 50.7% (v1 on 5-mix bench); BC ceiling formally diagnosed across r5/r6/r7
X automation gotcha documented: Lexical editor requires real keyboard events, not execCommand insertText; CreateTweet queryId rotated to Qkq4oPdZYuNB_Qw3TDuFqQ

notes: Most repos show 1 'Initial commit - uploaded via github-uploader-buildout' commit dated today — automated repo-init churn, not real activity. commits_today/lines_changed_today set to 0 for those repos. Real today-activity isolated to antcolony (4 substantive PPO commits, ~673 LOC) and TRW (no-code: tweet + wiki/memory). Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client harvest skipped — no Gmail/Calendar connector on kokonoe.
